name: Oh Boy Cookie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch fluted tube pan.
3. Cut each sandwich cookie into quarters.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour and remaining ingredients (except chocolate glaze) until blended.
5. Increase speed to high and beat for 2 minutes.
6. Spoon about 3/4 cup batter into the prepared pan.
7. Gently stir in the cut-up cookies and spoon them into the same pan.
8. Bake for 50 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched with a finger.
9. Cool the cake in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool completely on a rack.
11. In a quart saucepan over low heat, heat the glaze ingredients together, stirring constantly, until melted and smooth.
12. Place the rack with the cake over a large plate to catch any drips, then pour the warm glaze over the top and sides of the cake.
13. Place the cake on a serving plate. Makes 12 servings.
